text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Kinko Sho. Seeking the Pearl,
my dorm roommate, also appears to be worried
about me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I have to work harder to be less immature... I
need to become a considerate Umamusume who
won't hurt anyone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm sure... that's the way a princess ought to be...
